A '''merdoc''' was a subterranean predatory [[Reptile/Legends|lizard]] that lived on [[Ahakista/Legends|Ahakista]]. It was smaller than a [[telcar]].

==Appearances==
*[[Rebellion 9|''Rebellion'' 9]]
